title: Tools, Device Commands, PBQs, and Certification Capstone · Incident Case: Net Pbq Integration
summary: Use software, hardware, discovery, capture, and device evidence to design, implement, secure, operate, and repair a branch network. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net pbq integration increment in a performance-based branch network capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Solve performance-based configuration and troubleshooting tasks by preserving requirements, recording state, and verifying all paths.
Interpret MAC table, route, interface, configuration, ARP, VLAN, and power command outputs without assuming vendor syntax.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
